# opnsense_dnsmasq_option (Resource)

Manages a Dnsmasq DHCP option on OPNsense. DHCP options can set or match Dnsmasq option values for clients.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_dnsmasq_option" "pxe_tftp" {
  type        = "set"
  value       = "66,192.0.2.20"
  description = "PXE TFTP server option"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) DHCP option type.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this DHCP option.
- `force` (Boolean) Force this option even if a client did not request it.
- `interface` (String) Interface this option applies to; blank means any allowed interface.
- `option` (String) IPv4 DHCP option key.
- `option6` (String) IPv6 DHCP option key.
- `set_tag` (String) Tag to set when this option matches.
- `tag` (Set of String) Tags this option matches.
- `value` (String) DHCP option value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the Dnsmasq DHCP option UUID from OPNsense.

```shell
terraform import opnsense_dnsmasq_option.pxe_tftp 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
